en: The teacher is here.

ch: B:不要再玩了!快坐在座位上!
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: soni ia Tarasangara Rima, tarasangai nura, arakukunu kita arapipiningi sumasima’ʉ!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: ʉʉ’ʉ manʉng! mukusa kita cikiringa cakʉran.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: nura ia Tarasangara Tutu, ca’ania nura arapipiningi kita kamamari!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: neni tia kamanʉngʉa musu totasiarʉ nura?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: nura ia Tarasangara Taniara, tia ku maracocua cina mukusa kiukai.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: tia ku taraparuparu, tia ku mukusa tota’ia.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: takituturu, musukʉmʉ vʉcʉkʉ maku, tia ku mukusa tota’ia.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.
May I go wash my hands?

ab: tia cu tarasangai kiaturu, mucana nusoni.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: takituturua, musukʉmʉ navungu maku, tia ku tuki tarasangai.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: takituturua, rocu Tarasangara Cani tia ku tuki tarasangai, tia ku ’apacʉ’ʉra ’iseeng.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Pi’i?
She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Pani?

ab: takituturua, musukʉmʉ Pani tamna ’ʉmʉca, tuki tarasangai soni.
en: Teacher, Pani has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Pi’i come?
She has a fever.
